rules.Daemonic: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
rules.Daemonic Engine: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save and is immune to the secondary effects of Weapon Disabled and Crew Stun. It still takes the additional Wounds from the Penetration Charts.
rules.Daemonic Thirst: A weapon with this rule inflicts a Mortal Wound on its bearer in each of your Command Phases if you did not cause a Wound with the weapon during the last Turn. This does not trigger on Turn 1.
rules.Malicious Volleys: If this model does not count as Moving this Turn, it may treat weapons with the Bolter rule as if they were in half range.
rules.Marks: Marks of Chaos are optional upgrades for units. Marks perform the following enhancements to units. Stats in Bold have this baked into the profile. Psychic Mastery Level # models and units may only use the corresponding spell list with their Marks.
rules.Mark of Slaanesh: This model gains I+1 and Counterattack. Slaanesh Spell List. Slaanesh Spell List S +10 points Phantasmgoria Target unit suffers Ld-2. Cast 6+ S +15 points Cacophonic Target unit takes a Ld test. For Choir each point they fail by the unit Cast 8+ suffers 1 Mortal Wound. S +25 points Pavane of Target unit may move up to 6". Slaanesh Cast 6+ S +30 points Symphony of Target unit suffers -1 To Hit Pain until your next Psychic Phase. Cast 8+ S +45 points Hysterical Frenzy 18 Target unit gains A+1 until your Cast 7+ next Psychic Phase. S +75 points Delightful Target unit with the Mark of Agonies Slaanesh gains a 5+ Feel No Cast 7+ Pain until your next Psychic Phase.
rules.Pure Blessings: Pure Blessings of Chaos are an added layer of enhancement. Most models will only gain access to Pure Blessings if they come with a Mark by default. The only way to gain a Pure Blessing is to have an entire army of the Mark of the same god, or to have an Undivided Mark for each exception. The Pure Blessing adds to the existing Mark's benefits. For example, a Mark of Khorne grants A+1 and the Pure Blessing results in A+1 for a total of A+2. Other Pure Blessings of the same army count as Marks of the same god for the purpose of army building. Stats in Bold have this baked into the profile.
rules.Pure Blessing of Slaanesh: This model gains I+2 and Fleet.
rules.Sonic: Sonic weapons inflict a -1 penalty to Cover Saves from their attacks.

rules.Impact Hits: When this unit's Melee is nominated to fight, if it is considered to have Charged this phase it inflicts d3 Auto Hits per Hellflayer at S6 AP3+.
rules.Impact Hit: When this unit's Melee is nominated to fight, if it is considered to have Charged this phase it inflicts d3 Auto Hits per Hellflayer at S6 AP3+.
rules.Locus of Slaanesh: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Slaanesh gains S+1.
rules.Lord of Chaos: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.
rules.Lord of Chao: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.
rules.Pursuit for Perfectionism: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Wound. For each roll of a 1 To Wound (after the reroll), the unit suffers 1 Mortal Wound.
rules.Aural Barrage: Charges against this model or its unit suffer -2 to the distance.
rules.Obsessive Annunciation: 6" Aura, this model and target unit's weapons of the following (Screamer Pistol, Blast Master, Doom Siren, Sonic Blaster, includes Heavy) gain Pinning.
rules.Arch Perfectionist: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Slaanesh gain +2 to Charge Rolls.
rules.Duelist: This model may choose the target of its Challenge. The target may not deny the Challenge. In addition, Fulgrim can perform Challenges even while alone.
rules.The Art of Superiority: When this model is in a challenge, Fulgrim may let the enemy model both fight before him as if the enemy had higher Initiative, had Charged, and was not Slow as well as reroll all failed To Hit and To Wound rolls. If Fulgrim does so, each unsaved Wound Fulgrim inflicts counts as double for Combat Resolution.

rules.Commorite Stimm Rack: This model gains I+5, A+2 until the end of the Round. One Use Only.
rules.Deranged: At the end of each Round, if this model did not cause any Wounds during the Round it suffers 1 Mortal Wound.
rules.Duelist Pride: This model may reroll all failed To Hit and To Wound rolls when in a Challenge.
rules.Possession: If a model is responsible for slaying Lucius, at the end of the battle it must take a Ld test -3. If it fails it is slain. Special Wargear:
rules.Armour of Shrieking Souls: 5+ Invulnerability Save. When in Melee, treat it as a 3+ Invulnerability Save instead.
rules.Armour of Shrieking Soul: 5+ Invulnerability Save. When in Melee, treat it as a 3+ Invulnerability Save instead.
rules.Cloak of Constriction: This model has a 5+ Feel No Pain.
rules.Delicate Precision: This model may reroll 1s To Wound.
rules.Mesmerizing Aura: 6" Aura, target unit suffers -1 To Hit in Melee.
rules.Prince of Slaanesh: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Slaanesh may reroll all To Hit rolls.
rules.Horrible Fascination: 6" Aura, target non-Titanic model must test Ld. If it fails, it cannot fight in the Assault Phase.
rules.Haunting Music: This model may Deny the Witch as if it were Psychic Mastery Level 2.
rules.Loner: This model may never join any units and may never be targeted by any Aura's that are not its own.
rules.Thrill of Speed: This model must always attempt Hit and Run each turn it is eligible to do so. This model must move its full M# in a straight line each Movement Phase. This model must Advance each Shooting Phase and can Shoot and Charge even if it Advances. This model must always declare Charges if it is legally able to do so. If this model is unable to do any of the above for any reason it is immediately placed back into Reserves. Special Wargear:
rules.Dazzline Acrobatics: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Slaanesh may reroll failed Charge rolls and gains Hit and Run.
rules.Dazzline Acrobatic: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Slaanesh may reroll failed Charge rolls and gains Hit and Run.
rules.The Eternal Dance: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Slaanesh may reroll 1s To Hit.
rules.Alluring: All units must pass a Ld test to Declare Shooting at this unit if they are within 12". This model always fails Invulnerability Saves. Daemonette: Infantry Daemonic Mark of Slaanesh Counterattack Deepstrike Fearless
rules.Disruptive Song: 12" Aura, target Psychic Mastery Level # model or unit suffers -2 To Cast. This Aura is Cast as a unit. Daemonette: Monstrous Infantry Daemonic Mark of Slaanesh Counterattack Deepstrike Fearless Very Bulky
rules.Dirge Caster: 12" Aura, target unit suffers Ld-2 and must take a Fear Test.
rules.Acute Senses: This unit may reroll the Scatter Dice for Deepstrike. Seeker: Infantry Steed Daemonic Mark of Slaanesh Counterattack Deepstrike Fearless Very Bulky

rules.Exalted Impact Hits: When this unit's Melee is nominated to fight, if it is considered to have Charged this phase it inflicts 2d3 Auto Hits per Hellflayer at S6 AP3+.
rules.Exalted Impact Hit: When this unit's Melee is nominated to fight, if it is considered to have Charged this phase it inflicts 2d3 Auto Hits per Hellflayer at S6 AP3+.
rules.Shining Aegis: This model has a 5+ Feel No Pain.
rules.Shining Aegi: This model has a 5+ Feel No Pain.
rules.Whitstealer Sword: 6" Aura, target unit suffers -1 To Hit this model.
rules.Dance of Serpents: 12 " Aura, target unit suffers -1 To Hit this model. This model Heals 1 Wound for each model it kills. It can Heal more than 1 Wound per turn in exception to the normal Healing rules but cannot exceed its starting Wound count.
rules.Dance of Serpent: 12 " Aura, target unit suffers -1 To Hit this model. This model Heals 1 Wound for each model it kills. It can Heal more than 1 Wound per turn in exception to the normal Healing rules but cannot exceed its starting Wound count.

wargear.Augar Array: 6" Aura, target unit does not scatter when Deepstriking. This Aura is cast when the first model is placed prior to scattering.
wargear.Extra Armour: You may treat Crew Stun results as Weapon Disabled instead.
wargear.Flare Launchers: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save vs ranged attacks.
wargear.Mark of Khorne: Khorne Mark model/unit only. May Deny the Witch as if Psychic Mastery Level 1.
wargear.Recovery Gear: Roll a d6, on a 5+ Repair the secondary effect from a Crew Stun or Immobilized Result.
wargear.Sigil of Corruption: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.
wargear.Smoke Launchers: 6" Range, put 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 To Hit and scatters to move an extra +1" until your next Command Phase. One Use Only. Use in your Shooting Phase Only.

rules.name: Distorting Vivid Vapors
rules.description: Models in your army gain a 5+ Cover Save. Models in your army can never have a Cover Save better than 5+.

rules.name: Pledges to the Dark Prince
rules.description: In your Command Phase, you MUST pledge a number of enemy Slots to be destroyed before your End Phase. You cannot pledge less than 1. If you succeed in your goal of # Slots destroyed or exceed it, your Warlord Heals # and can exceed their starting Wound Count as an exception to the normal rules. If you fail to destroy # Slots, your Warlord suffers 1d3 Mortal Wounds.

rules.name: Degenerates
rules.description: Models in your army count each wound caused in Melee as 2 points instead of 1 for purposes of Combat Resolution.

rules.name: Sadistic Psychopaths
rules.description: Models must declare Charges whenever they are able to do so and cannot do anything that would make Declaring Charges illegal (i.e. such as shooting heavy weapons, advancing, etc. so long as they are within 12" of an enemy).

rules.name: Prideful Arrogance
rules.description: No unit in your army may have more than 1 joined Independent Character at a time.

rules.name: Transhuman Speed
rules.description: All models in your army gain M+2.

rules.name: IFV Specialists
rules.description: Models in your army gain a 5+ Cover Save until your next Command Phase when they Disembark or Force Disembark from a Transport.

rules.name: The Need for Speed
rules.description: Models in your army only count as half a model for Contesting Objective Markers.

rules.name: Eyeball Artisans
rules.description: Models in your army will never pursue fleeing units and automatically pass all Hold tests. They will not perform the 3" move after winning combat. All enemy units within 6" suffer Ld-1 and take a Fear Test, with the -1 wearing off in their next Command Phase.

rules.name: Arrogant Superiority
rules.description: Your opponent is always considered to have rolled higher than you for Initiative.

rules.name: Tactical Perfection
rules.description: For each 1000 points in your army, you may redeploy 1 unit after Deployment. This is done after Infiltrators and Scouts are placed or perform their moves.

rules.name: Expert Duelists
rules.description: Models in your army gain Furious Charge.

rules.name: Pride Before the Fall
rules.description: Models in your army suffer -1 To Hit for the rest of the game if their unit loses Combat Resolution.

rules.name: Troop Carrier Combat Stimulants
rules.description: On your turn, models that Disembarked from a Transport in your army gains S+1. This bonus is removed during your End Phase.

rules.name: Excessive Glitter
rules.description: Enemy models performing Overwatch attacks against your models gain a +1 To Hit as an exception to the rules for Snap Shots.

rules.name: Rapid Deployment
rules.description: Models in your army may charge on the turn they Disembark from a Transport that does not have Assault Ramps, but treat the charge as Disorganized.

rules.name: Eager to Please
rules.description: Models in your army may reroll failed Charges.

rules.name: Repulsed by Weakness
rules.description: If a unit in your army fail a Charge, every model in the unit must roll a Dangerous Terrain Test.

rules.name: Excessive Audio
rules.description: All friendly models in your army suffer a -1 penalty to Cover Saves.

rules.name: Tectonic Plate Disruption
rules.description: Once per battle, in your Command Phase you may declare a Tectonic Plate Disruption. If you do so, Open Terrain counts as Difficult Terrain, and Difficult Terrain Counts as Dangerous Terrain. The effect lasts until your next Command Phase.

rules.name: Thrill of the Hunt
rules.description: Models in your army gain Hit and Run and MUST pursue fleeing units.

rules.name: Emotional Fug
rules.description: Friendly models within 6" of a Daemonic Engine gain Stubborn.

rules.name: Prone to Overindulgence
rules.description: Units in your army suffer 1 Auto Wound for each point they lose Combat Resolution by. This stacks with the Auto Wounds caused by Fearless models losing Combat Resolution.
